# Alzheimer Latin America Dashboard

> Interactive epidemiological dashboard on Alzheimer's Disease in Latin America (2000–2050).

## Author
Juan Moisés de la Serna Tuya (UNIR)
ORCID: 0000-0002-8401-8018
Email: jmsernatuya@gmail.com

## Description
Open dataset and interactive dashboard covering Alzheimer's Disease epidemiology across 8 Latin American countries (Argentina, Brazil, Chile, Colombia, Cuba, Mexico, Peru, Uruguay). Includes prevalence estimates, projections to 2050, caregiver burden indicators, policy index scores, and socioeconomic correlates. Data spans 2000–2050 with 5-year intervals.

## Coverage
- Countries: Argentina, Brazil, Chile, Colombia, Cuba, Mexico, Peru, Uruguay
- Years: 2000–2050 (projected)
- Variables: prevalence, incidence, mortality, caregiver burden, policy index, GDP correlation

## Dataset DOI
https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/UVHABW

## Dashboard URL
https://juanmoisesd.github.io/alzheimer-latinamerica-dashboard/

## Citation
Serna Tuya, J.M. (2025). Alzheimer Latin America Dashboard: Epidemiological Open Dataset. Harvard Dataverse. https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/UVHABW

## Keywords
alzheimer, dementia, latin america, epidemiology, open data, public health, aging, neuroscience, caregiver burden
